title: SOL 45pk Rocket Balloons, Assorted Colours Flying Whistling Party Bag Fillers for Kids, Durable Latex, Noisy Screaming, Perfect for Parties, Loot Bags, and Fun Activities
features: Rocket Balloons for Outdoor Games: A balloon rocket is a rubber balloon filled with air or other gases. Besides being simple stems toys, balloon rockets are a widely used as a teaching device to demonstrate basic physics. These whistling balloons are great for outdoor party, for fun and entertainment.

Birthday Party Balloons for Kids and Adults: Surely your love ones and friends will get excited and thrilled to have this rocket balloon around. Blow it up and let it go on the air. It whistles upon going to the air. It adds some fun activities to the party, to a simple family bonding and gathering outside.

Rock and Roll Rocket Balloons: Set your party to rock with Rocket Balloons. Set it outside, blow it up and let it flew high with a whistling noise and let the children chased them all over the place. You can do this over and over again, so you could hold a party with excitement all day long.

Materials: Rocket balloons are latex balloons, so they are safe to play around with kids. High quality latex balloons so it’s not easily explode and burst. Perfect for outdoor games and for indoor decorations. Colourful rocket balloons add some whistling noise to the party.
Inclusion: 45 pcs of Rocket Balloon selected at random.

SOL Rocket Balloons are latex balloons filled with air, producing a whistling sound when released. Great for outdoor fun. Are these rocket balloons suitable for kids' birthday parties? Yes, SOL Rocket Balloons are perfect for kids' birthday parties, adding excitement and fun as they whistle through the air when released. How many rocket balloons are included in a pack? Each pack includes 45 SOL Rocket Balloons, selected in assorted colours, along with 45 plastic tubes for easy inflation. Are these balloons safe for children to play with? Yes, these rocket balloons are made of high-quality latex, making them safe for kids and durable enough for repeated use. Can these balloons be used both indoors and outdoors? Absolutely, SOL Rocket Balloons are versatile and can be enjoyed both indoors for decoration and outdoors for games and entertainment.
